title: A Nuisance in the Woods
description: The town guards are busy. Help them clear out some goblins from the Whispering Woods.

title: The Undead Menace
description: Skeletons have been spotted wandering near the old ruins. Put them back to rest.

title: Clear the Roads
description: Bandits are disrupting the trade routes. Show them the error of their ways.

title: Dragon Slayer
description: Defeat the mighty Shadow Dragon residing in The Dark Throne.
